steps.title: Recognize doubling as exponential growth
steps.content:
When bacteria double each hour, the population multiplies by 2 each time.
After 1 hour: $44,000 \cdot 2$
After 2 hours: $44,000 \cdot 2^2$
After $t$ hours: $44,000 \cdot 2^t$

steps.title: Match the formula to an answer choice
steps.content:
Rewriting with standard notation:
$$y = 44,000(2)^t$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
